name: HR managers in small to medium-sized marketing agencies using BambooHR for employee management tool
description: For HR managers in small to medium-sized marketing agencies processing 5–15 projects/month, inadequate staffing forecasts cause project delays. We provide proactive staffing alerts instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
target_audience: HR managers in small to medium-sized marketing agencies using BambooHR for employee management
problem_solved: Inability to effectively forecast staffing needs leading to project delays.

locked_fields.primary_user: HR managers in small to medium-sized marketing agencies using BambooHR for employee management
locked_fields.primary_problem: Inability to effectively forecast staffing needs leading to project delays.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For HR managers in small to medium-sized marketing agencies processing 5–15 projects/month, inadequate staffing forecasts cause project delays. We provide proactive staffing alerts instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual tracking of employee availability through spreadsheets

one_liner: For HR managers in small to medium-sized marketing agencies processing 5–15 projects/month, inadequate staffing forecasts cause project delays. We provide proactive staffing alerts instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
